pace.caveat: not fuel-corrected; tyre-management can mask true pace
pace.headline: RUS 0.37s/lap slower on like compounds

start.caveat: lap-1 swing within normal first-lap scatter
start.headline: RUS -1 places on lap 1

tyre.caveat: fuel burn partially offsets degradation; small stint counts
tyre.headline: RUS tyres degrade 0.133s/lap more on like compounds

where.caveat: based on 50 vs 49 unique comparable laps — significance is exploratory at this sample size

attribution.narrative: Sector 4 (756-1008 m): 0.150 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~16 m later than RUS (entry); ANT carries ~45 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 16 (3781-4033 m): 0.122 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~6 m later than RUS (entry); ANT carries ~5 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 6 (1260-1512 m): 0.099 s to RUS [real (CI excludes 0)]. RUS carries ~20 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner); RUS gets to full throttle ~40 m sooner (exit).

where.headline: RUS gained in 14 of 20 micro-sectors
